name: Gf Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
This is a special recipe made without gluten.
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 9 x 5 inch loaf pan. Sift together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, and unflavored gelatin. Cream the margarine and sugar thoroughly until light and fluffy. Add the egg yolks and vanilla, continuing to beat until the mixture is smooth. Mix in the lemon peel, mashed banana, and yogurt. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, beating just until combined. Beat the egg whites to stiff peaks that are not dry. Gently fold the egg whites into the batter. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan and bake for 1 hour.
